title: スライド作成skillはどうなった？
summary_text: - **Backend-agnostic rename target** `structured_native` → `local_native` `nanobanana_manus` → `external_adaptive` `variants/structured-native` → `variants/local-native` `variants/nanobanana-manus` → `variants/external-adaptive` - **Primary code touchpoints (required)** [run-slide-variant-matrix.js#L6](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/run-slide-variant-matrix.js#L6) [run-slide-variant-matrix.js#L688](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/run-slide-variant-matrix.js#L688) [run-slide-variant-matrix.js#L819](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/run-slide-variant-matrix.js#L819) [run-slide-variant-matrix.js#L820](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/run-slide-variant-matrix.js#L820) [run-slide-variant-matrix.js#L849](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/run-slide-variant-matrix.js#L849) [run-slide-variant-matrix.js#L850](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/run-slide-variant-matrix.js#L850) - **Runtime contract docs touchpoints (required)** [SKILL.md#L89](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/SKILL.md#L89) [runtime-map.md#L76](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/references/runtime-map.md#L76) [runtime-map.md#L81](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/references/runtime-map.md#L81) [runtime-map.md#L135](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/references/runtime-map.md#L135) - **Test touchpoint (recommended for schema lock-in)** [test-unit-variant-matrix.js#L66](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/test-unit-variant-matrix.js#L66) `buildVariantMatrix()` テストで `variants.local_native` / `variants.external_adaptive` を明示アサート追加（現状はキー名未検証）。 - **Scope check result** `claude-config` 側には同名 touchpoint は現時点で存在しません（rename作業対象なし）。
